word: G1286 - διασείω - diaseíō - dee-as-i'-o - Do violence to

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Do violence to
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to shake thoroughly; tropically, to make to tremble, to terrify
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and G4579; to shake thoroughly, that is, (figuratively) to intimidate: - do violence to.
